ourMartyrsDoNotDie: Our martyrs do not die; they live in our revolution.
livingArchiveSubtitle: A living digital archive preserving the names, faces, and stories of those who gave everything for freedom.
archiveIncomplete: This archive is incomplete. Help us remember them all.

theirNamesAreStars: Their names are stars in our sky.
